query:
UPDATE labelAssociations la
JOIN products p ON p.id = la.productId
SET la.tenantId = p.tenantId
WHERE la.tenantId = 1
  AND p.tenantId IS NOT NULL
  AND p.tenantId != 1;

SELECT ROW_COUNT() AS label_associations_corrigidas;
